steps.title: Identify the defining contrast
steps.content: The passage acknowledges Morton was exaggerating about inventing jazz, then states “No one can deny” his innovations helped shape jazz. These opposite assessments need a word that shows the contrast between them.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
”Though” means “however” or “despite this,” bridging the acknowledged exaggeration with the undeniable contributions. The others—therefore, in the second place, and in other words—express consequence, enumeration, or rephrasing respectively, which don't convey contrast.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
